Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPALL2 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Allergy Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;VA POINT OF SERVICE (KIOSKS);**19**;Oct 21, 2011;Build 64 ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DVPXUTL ; EN1^GMRADPT 2421,10099 ; EN1^GMRAOR2 2422 ; ^GMRA(120.82 2380 ; ALL^PSN5067 4829 ; C^PSN50P65 4543 ; $$TGTOG^PSNAPIS 2574 ; $$TGTOG2^PSNAPIS 2574 ; Q ; SRCHALRG(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N PARAMS,DFN,ICN,SDATE,EDATE,RSLTARY,RSLTCNT,SMRY S DFN="",SMRY=0 N X F X="patientId","DFN","SDATE","EDATE" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,.PARAMS) ; ;clean out unused params D CLNPARAM^DVPUTLS ; S ICN=$P($G(QUERYPAR("patient")),U) S DVPSITE=$$SITE^VASITE,DVPSTN=$P(DVPSITE,U,3) I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"SRCHALRG^DVPALL2")=0 G QUIT ; ; Default to last 5000 days I SDATE']"" S SDATE=$$FMADD^XLFDT(DT,-5000) I EDATE']"" S EDATE=DT ; Determine first the nka status N GMRAL,ID D EN1^GMRADPT I 'GMRAL S @TARGET@("results","assessment")=$S(GMRAL=0:"nka",1:"not done") S @TARGET@("results","patient","DFN")=DFN S @TARGET@("results","patient","ICN")=ICN ;local site S @TARGET@("results","patient","medicalCenter","siteId")=$P(DVPSITE,U) S @TARGET@("results","patient","medicalCenter","name")=$P(DVPSITE,U,2) ; ; First filtering using the API's N GMRAL,GMRA,ID S GMRA="0^0^111" ;************** ;category ;************** N CATDATA S:$G(QUERYPAR("category"))="" CATDATA="111" D:$G(QUERYPAR("category"))'="" . N CAT S CAT=$P(QUERYPAR("category"),U) . D:$P(QUERYPAR("category"),U,2)="" . . S:CAT'="food"&CAT'="medication" CATDATA="100" . . S:CAT="food" CATDATA="010" . . S:CAT="medication" CATDATA="001" . D:$P(QUERYPAR("category"),U,2)="not" . . S:CAT'="food"&CAT'="medication" CATDATA="011" . . S:CAT="food" CATDATA="101" . . S:CAT="medication" CATDATA="110" S $P(GMRA,U,3)=CATDATA ;************** ;verificationstatus ;************** ;***IMPORTANT*** entered-in-error status will be checked later N VSDATA S VSDATA=0 D:$G(QUERYPAR("verificationstatus"))'="" . N VS S VS=$P(QUERYPAR("verificationstatus"),U) . S:VS="confirmed" VSDATA=1 . S:VS="unconfirmed" VSDATA=2 S $P(GMRA,U,2)=VSDATA ; D EN2^GMRADPT ; ;second filtering using own code S (ID,RSLTCNT)=0 F S ID=+$O(GMRAL(ID)) Q:ID<1 D SEARCH(ID) ; ;Check _summary status S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("_summary")),U)="true" SMRY=1 ; ;Build the response using paging if needed N PAGING D:+$G(RSLTARY)>0 . D PAGING^DVPUTLS(RSLTARY,.PAGING) . F RSLTCNT=PAGING("RSTART"):1:PAGING("REND") Q:RSLTCNT=0 D . . D GMRA1^DVPALL1(RSLTARY(RSLTCNT),RSLTCNT,SMRY) ;and quit D MRGPGNG^DVPUTLS ; QUIT ; Q ; SEARCH(ID) ; N FOUND,MOD,DVPREC S FOUND=0,(DVPREC,MOD)="" ;************** ;identifier ;************** I $G(QUERYPAR("identifier"))'="" D Q:'FOUND . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("identifier")),U,2)="" S:+$P($P($G(QUERYPAR("identifier")),U),":",6)=ID FOUND=1 Q . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("identifier")),U,2)="not" S:+$P($P($G(QUERYPAR("identifier")),U),":",6)'=ID FOUND=1 ; ;Fetch allergy data N GMRA,DVPY,REAC,X,Y,I,ALGID,VERSTS S GMRA=$G(GMRAL(ID)) D EN1^GMRAOR2(ID,"DVPY") ; ;************** ;code ;************** N CODE S CODE=0 I $G(QUERYPAR("code")) D Q:'FOUND . I $P(GMRA,U,9) D . . S X=$P(GMRA,U,9) ;,REAC("reference")=X . . S Y=+$P(X,"(",2) I 'Y,X["PSDRUG" S Y=50 . . S I=$$VUID^DVPXUTL(+X,Y),CODE="" I I]"" S CODE=$P($$SETVURN^DVPXUTL("vuid",I),":",4) . . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("code")),U,2)="" S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("code")),U)=CODE FOUND=1 Q . . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("code")),U,2)="not" S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("code")),U)'=CODE FOUND=1 ; ;************** ;manifestation ;************** S FOUND=0 I $G(QUERYPAR("manifestation"))'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("manifestation")),U,2)="not" FOUND='FOUND Q:'FOUND . N TERM S TERM=$P($G(QUERYPAR("manifestation")),U) . N I,Y S I=0 F S I=$O(GMRAL(ID,"S",I)) Q:I<1 D . . I $P($G(GMRAL(ID,"S",I)),";")=TERM S FOUND=1 Q . I FOUND,$P($G(QUERYPAR("manifestation")),U,2)="" Q . I 'FOUND,$P($G(QUERYPAR("manifestation")),U,2)="not" S FOUND=1 ; ;************** ;type ;************** S FOUND=0 I $G(QUERYPAR("type"))'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("type")),U,2)="not" FOUND='FOUND Q:'FOUND . S:$P(GMRAL(ID),U,5)=$S($P($G(QUERYPAR("type")),U)="allergy":0,$P($G(QUERYPAR("type")),U)="intollerance":1,1:-1) FOUND=1 ; ;************** ;verificationstatus ONLY entered-in-error ;************** I $G(QUERYPAR("verificationstatus"))'="" D Q:'FOUND . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("verificationstatus")),U)="entered-in-error" S:GMRA="" FOUND=1 ; ;************** ;date ;************** I $G(QUERYPAR("date"))'="" D Q:'FOUND . Q:'$P(DVPY,U,9) . I $$DTCMPR^DVPUTLS($P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U),$P(DVPY,U,9),$P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U,3))=1 S FOUND=1 ; ;************** ;lastdate ;************** I $G(QUERYPAR("lastdate"))'="" D Q:'FOUND . N I S I=0,I=$O(DVPY("O",I,-1)) Q:+I=0 . S X=$G(DVPY("O",I)) . I $$DTCMPR^DVPUTLS($P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U),$P(X,U),$P($G(QUERYPAR("lastdate")),U,3))=1 S FOUND=1 ; ;************** ;onset ;************** I $G(QUERYPAR("onset"))'="" Q ; ;************** ;severity ;************** I $G(QUERYPAR("severity"))'="" Q ; ;************** ;route ;************** I $G(QUERYPAR("route"))'="" Q ; ;************** ;recorder ;************** I $G(QUERYPAR("recorder"))'="" D Q:'FOUND . S MOD=$P(QUERYPAR("recorder"),U,2) . S DVPREC=$G(^GMR(120.8,DFN,0)),DVPREC=$P(DVPREC,U,5) . I DVPREC'="" S DVPREC=$G(^VA(200,DVPREC,0)),DVPREC=$P(DVPREC,U) . I MOD="exact"!MOD="" I DVPREC=$P(QUERYPAR("recorder"),U) S FOUND=1 Q . I MOD="contains" I DVPREC[$P(QUERYPAR("recorder"),U) S FOUND=1 ; ;************** ;asserter ;************** I $G(QUERYPAR("asserter"))'="" D Q:'FOUND . S MOD=$P(QUERYPAR("asserter"),U,2) . S DVPREC=$G(^GMR(120.8,DFN,0)),DVPREC=$P(DVPREC,U,18) . I DVPREC'="" S DVPREC=$G(^VA(200,DVPREC,0)),DVPREC=$P(DVPREC,U) . I MOD="exact"!MOD="" I DVPREC=$P(QUERYPAR("asserter"),U) S FOUND=1 Q . I MOD="contains" I DVPREC[$P(QUERYPAR("asserter"),U) S FOUND=1 ; ;************** ;criticality ;************** I $G(QUERYPAR("criticality"))'="" D Q:'FOUND . N I,SEVERITY S I=0 F S I=$O(DVPY("O",I)) Q:I<1 D . . S X=$G(VPSY("O",I)) Q:X="" . . I $P(X,U,2)]"" S SEVERITY($P(X,U,2))="" . S:$G(SEVERITY("MILD")) SEVERITY="mild" . S:$G(SEVERITY("MODERATE")) SEVERITY="low" . S:$G(SEVERITY("SEVERE")) SEVERITY="high" . S:$G(SEVERITY)="" SEVERITY="unable-to-assess" . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("criticality")),U,2)="" D Q . . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("criticality")),U)=SEVERITY S FOUND=1 . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("criticality")),U,2)="not",$P($G(QUERYPAR("criticality")),U)'=SEVERITY S FOUND=1 ; ;************** ;clinicalstatus ;************** I $G(QUERYPAR("clinicalstatus"))'="" D Q:'FOUND . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("clinicalstatus")),U,2)="" D Q . . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("clinicalstatus")),U)="active" S FOUND=1 . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("clinicalstatus")),U,2)="not",$P($G(QUERYPAR("clinicalstatus")),U)'="active" S FOUND=1 ; ;update the search result array S RSLTCNT=RSLTCNT+1,RSLTARY(RSLTCNT)=ID,RSLTARY=RSLTCNT Q
